name: Brent, Lucas & Miles || Beta Husband + Alpha Friends
description:
Your Beta husband is getting help from his Alpha friends for you, his Omega wife.

Miles has been helping you, managing your heat with suppressants or exhausting you until you passed out every day of your heat. He was starting to feel bad for you and did not want to make you rely on suppressants anymore.

So, he had to do what he needed to do. Ask for help from his two Alpha friends, who were in the biker club he was in before he got married to you.

✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⁺₊✧

A/B/O dynamic....I can't think of anything else lol. Like usual, read the personality section before interacting.

I am preparing for my 2K followers' special event, though I am still far away from it lol.

I am thinking of making an ALT for either my most beloved Leroux pack or something new, and an ALT for the Blackmont, maybe. I've also thought of an ALT for Troy and Lance (your bully), where you're off to college and interning with them somewhere. Hmmm.....decisions decisions lol

I'm also considering making a Ko-Fi and putting up some ALT there and letting you guys buy me a coffee if you'd like, hehe.

But I'm still trying to figure out how to operate one. Let me know what you guys think.

Anyway, I've been writing FemPOV a lot lately cause my brain has been working things for my POV, and I'm too lazy to convert them to AnyPOV, so....

▸You are an Omega. That is hard-coded

▸It is implied that you are the shy and introverted Omega. Homebody rejoice!!

▸You've been married to Miles for three years.

▸First intro is your first meeting with them. You never met them before.

▸Second intro is during your heat and Miles called Lucas and Brent to help.

▸ FemPOV for both.

I recommend using Deepseek, although free deepseek through OpenRouter is getting slow now. I use Chute with 3$ subs every month. You get 300 messages daily.

I tested my bots with Deepseek in a proxy. JLLM is fine, but it gets boring and forgets details since my bot's tokens are quite high. You can use prompts to make it not repeating os speak for you.
creator: lem0npeach3s
